title: exists with nulls gives incorrect result
description: Unexpected empty result with not exists and null on left side.
poc: create table a (i int, j int);
select * from (select cast(null as int), 0 ) b(i,j) where not exists (select 1 from a where a.i = b.i and a.j = b.j);
key_bug_features: not exists with nulls on left side
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(50), nullable_col INT);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 'test1', NULL), (2, 'test2', 10), (3, 'test3', NULL);
SELECT * FROM (SELECT CAST(NULL AS INT) AS id, 10 AS value) AS subquery WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_table WHERE test_table.id = subquery.id AND test_table.value = subquery.value);
CREATE TABLE another_table (num INT, description TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'default');
